name: Chainlink announces top winners of Constellation 2023 hackathon
snippet: In a blog announcement on Dec. 20, the developer of the Chainlink decentralized oracle network said it had granted the main $25,000 prize to Unwallet.me, a seedless and gasless multi-chain crypto wallet.
